alt: Pristine historical specimen representing the endemic New Guinea distribution
caption: The species is widely distributed across the central mountainous spine and isolated mountain ranges of New Guinea.
acquisitionNotes: High-quality archival image demonstrating regional taxonomy. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/47/Lophorina_superba_superba_%2848719820777%29.jpg
